title.en: Inside a Provider Backbone Bridged Network (PBBN): Addressing, CFM, and PBB-TE Protection
title.zh: 走进运营商骨干桥接网络（PBBN）：寻址、CFM 与 PBB-TE 保护倒换

blocks.en: A Provider Backbone Bridged Network (PBBN) is a carrier's core network that wraps each customer's frames inside a fresh backbone envelope so that the core only ever has to understand the carrier's own addresses, never the millions of customer addresses behind them. Clause 26 is the 'operations manual' that ties together how the backbone bridges forward, learn, manage, and protect these encapsulated services. This lesson (part 1) walks the whole clause as a coverage map: PBBN structure and addressing (26.1-26.7), connectivity fault management (CFM) across the backbone (26.8), and then the traffic-engineered variant PBB-TE with its protection switching (26.9-26.12).
blocks.zh: 运营商骨干桥接网络（PBBN，Provider Backbone Bridged Network）是运营商的核心网，它把每位客户的帧封装进一层全新的骨干外壳，使核心只需理解运营商自己的地址，而无需认识背后成百上千万的客户地址。Clause 26 就是这套“操作手册”，把骨干桥接如何转发、学习、管理与保护这些被封装的业务串联起来。本课（第 1 部分）以覆盖图的方式走读整章：PBBN 结构与寻址（26.1–26.7）、跨骨干的连通性故障管理（CFM，26.8），以及具有保护倒换能力的流量工程变体 PBB-TE（26.9–26.12）。

blocks.en: The cast of devices (26.1, 26.2): a Backbone Edge Bridge (BEB) sits at the rim of the PBBN and does the encapsulation/de-encapsulation; a Backbone Core Bridge (BCB) sits in the middle and only forwards on backbone addresses. Inside a BEB, the I-component owns the Provider Instance Port (PIP), which learns customer MAC (C-MAC) addresses and adds a service identifier called the I-SID; the B-component owns the Customer Backbone Port (CBP), which adds the backbone VLAN tag (B-TAG) carrying a backbone VID (B-VID) and forwards on backbone MAC (B-MAC) addresses. Figure 26-1 lays out three zones — customer equipment, the PBBN, and other PBBNs reached over an External Network-to-Network Interface (E-NNI).
blocks.zh: 设备阵容（26.1、26.2）：骨干边缘桥接（BEB，Backbone Edge Bridge）位于 PBBN 边缘，负责封装与解封装；骨干核心桥接（BCB，Backbone Core Bridge）位于核心，只依据骨干地址转发。在 BEB 内部，I 分量拥有运营商实例端口（PIP，Provider Instance Port），它学习客户 MAC（C-MAC）地址并添加名为 I-SID 的业务标识；B 分量拥有客户骨干端口（CBP，Customer Backbone Port），它添加承载骨干 VID（B-VID）的骨干 VLAN 标签（B-TAG），并依据骨干 MAC（B-MAC）地址转发。图 26-1 划分了三个区域：客户设备区、PBBN 区，以及通过外部网络间接口（E-NNI，External Network-to-Network Interface）相连的其他 PBBN。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 640 170" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><text x="8" y="16" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12">Customer frame encapsulated into a B-MAC frame at the BEB</text><rect x="8" y="34" width="110" height="34"/><text x="63" y="55" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">C-DA / C-SA / payload</text><text x="63" y="82" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">customer frame</text><line x1="126" y1="51" x2="158" y2="51" marker-end="url(#a)"/><rect x="166" y="34" width="70" height="34"/><text x="201" y="55" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">B-DA</text><rect x="236" y="34" width="70" height="34"/><text x="271" y="55" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">B-SA</text><rect x="306" y="34" width="78" height="34"/><text x="345" y="55" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">B-TAG (B-VID)</text><rect x="384" y="34" width="78" height="34"/><text x="423" y="55" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">I-TAG (I-SID)</text><rect x="462" y="34" width="160" height="34"/><text x="542" y="55" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">original customer frame (SDU)</text><text x="315" y="96" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">backbone B-MAC frame forwarded by BCBs across the B-VLAN</text><defs><marker id="a" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" refX="7" refY="4" orient="auto"><path d="M0 0 L8 4 L0 8 z" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/></marker></defs></svg>

caption.en: Encapsulation at the BEB: the customer frame becomes the payload of a backbone frame carrying B-DA, B-SA, a B-TAG (B-VID) and an I-TAG (I-SID). BCBs forward only on the backbone header.
caption.zh: BEB 处的封装：客户帧成为骨干帧的净荷，骨干帧携带 B-DA、B-SA、B-TAG（B-VID）与 I-TAG（I-SID）。BCB 仅依据骨干头部转发。

blocks.en: Connectivity and addressing (26.3, 26.4). Each B-VLAN's reachability is built by Multiple Spanning Tree Protocol (MSTP) for loop-free active topologies and Multiple VLAN Registration Protocol (MVRP) to prune each B-VLAN down to where it is needed (26.3); crucially the backbone's MSTP/MVRP run independently of any customer protocol because the BEB strips customer bridge control frames at the edge. For addresses (26.4), the B-SA identifies the encapsulating PIP, and the default B-DA is a 'Backbone Service Instance Group address' built by concatenating the OUI 00-1E-83 (Table 26-1) with the 3-octet I-SID and setting the group bit — so an unknown or multicast frame floods to every CBP on that B-VLAN, and egress I-SID filtering keeps it inside the right service. 26.4.1 explains how a PIP can instead learn an individual peer B-MAC (via the connection_identifier in the forwarding database, FDB) and, for two-endpoint services, pin it as the default B-DA. 26.4.2 lets a CBP translate that group B-DA (and even the I-SID) to locally meaningful values, which is what makes peer interconnects scale. 26.4.3 adds the rule that addresses given to CFM Maintenance Points (MPs) on PIPs and CBPs must be unique within the right scope.
blocks.zh: 连通性与寻址（26.3、26.4）。每个 B-VLAN 的可达性由多生成树协议（MSTP，Multiple Spanning Tree Protocol）构建无环活动拓扑，并由多 VLAN 注册协议（MVRP，Multiple VLAN Registration Protocol）把 B-VLAN 裁剪到真正需要它的范围（26.3）；关键在于骨干的 MSTP/MVRP 与任何客户协议彼此独立，因为 BEB 会在边缘剥离客户桥接控制帧。在寻址方面（26.4），B-SA 标识执行封装的 PIP；默认 B-DA 是“骨干业务实例组地址”，由 OUI 00-1E-83（表 26-1）与 3 字节 I-SID 拼接并置位组播位而成——于是未知或组播帧会泛洪到该 B-VLAN 上所有 CBP，再由出口的 I-SID 过滤把它限制在正确的业务内。26.4.1 说明 PIP 也可借助转发数据库（FDB）中的 connection_identifier 学习对端的单播 B-MAC，并对两端点业务把它固定为默认 B-DA。26.4.2 允许 CBP 把该组播 B-DA（乃至 I-SID）翻译成本地有意义的取值，这正是对等互连得以扩展的原因。26.4.3 补充规定：PIP 与 CBP 上 CFM 维护点（MP，Maintenance Point）所用地址须在相应范围内唯一。

blocks.en: Loops, scaling, and management (26.5-26.7). Because the carrier cannot trust a customer network to run spanning tree, 26.5 says the provider must have a policy for loops formed through attached networks — and a customer can attach redundantly using Layer Two Gateway Ports so that only one path is ever active. 26.6 scales PBBNs by joining them over E-NNIs: a hierarchical interconnect (26.6.1) nests one PBBN's B-VLANs as services inside a higher-level PBBN, adding an encapsulation layer per level; a peer interconnect (26.6.2) keeps a flat service space and joins two PBBNs by an I-tagged interface between two CBPs, with optional I-SID translation. 26.7 simply mandates that PBB management belongs to the backbone provider — customers get no access to backbone managed objects.
blocks.zh: 环路、扩展与管理（26.5–26.7）。由于运营商无法信任客户网络会运行生成树，26.5 要求运营商必须针对经由所连接网络形成的环路制定策略——客户也可借助二层网关端口（Layer Two Gateway Port）冗余接入，使得任一时刻只有一条路径处于活动状态。26.6 通过 E-NNI 互连来扩展 PBBN：分层互连（26.6.1）把一个 PBBN 的 B-VLAN 当作业务嵌入到更高层 PBBN 中，每加一层就增加一层封装；对等互连（26.6.2）保持扁平的业务空间，通过两个 CBP 之间的 I 标签接口连接两个 PBBN，并可选地翻译 I-SID。26.7 则明确规定：PBB 的管理归骨干运营商所有——客户无权访问骨干被管对象。

blocks.en: CFM in PBBs (26.8). Connectivity Fault Management (CFM) places Maintenance End Points (MEPs) and Maintenance Intermediate Points (MIPs) into a layered set of Maintenance Associations (MAs) so faults can be detected, isolated, and reported. Because the BEB encapsulates everything a customer sends, the customer's own CFM frames become opaque inside the core — which neatly gives the PBBN its own fresh stack of eight Maintenance Domain (MD) levels for backbone monitoring, sitting in parallel with separate level-stacks for customer service, B-VLANs, and individual LAN links. Sub-clauses 26.8.1-26.8.4 walk the example MAs for each interface type: Port-based / S-tagged service interfaces (26.8.1), I-tagged service interfaces (26.8.2), the hierarchical E-NNI (26.8.3), and the peer E-NNI (26.8.4), where some MAs span the demarcation point between two PBBNs and others stay inside one.
blocks.zh: PBB 中的 CFM（26.8）。连通性故障管理（CFM，Connectivity Fault Management）把维护端点（MEP，Maintenance End Point）与维护中间点（MIP，Maintenance Intermediate Point）布置进分层的维护关联（MA，Maintenance Association）中，从而检测、隔离并上报故障。由于 BEB 会封装客户发送的一切，客户自身的 CFM 帧在核心内变得不可见——这恰好让 PBBN 获得了一套全新的、八个维护域（MD，Maintenance Domain）层级用于骨干监测，并与客户业务、B-VLAN 及单条 LAN 链路各自独立的层级栈并行存在。子条款 26.8.1–26.8.4 走读各接口类型的示例 MA：基于端口/S 标签业务接口（26.8.1）、I 标签业务接口（26.8.2）、分层 E-NNI（26.8.3）以及对等 E-NNI（26.8.4）——其中一些 MA 跨越两个 PBBN 之间的分界点，另一些则只停留在某一侧。

blocks.en:
flowchart LR
  CE[Customer] --> PIP[BEB: PIP adds I-SID]
  PIP --> CBP[BEB: CBP adds B-TAG]
  CBP --> BCB[BCB core forwards on B-MAC]
  BCB --> CBP2[Remote CBP]
  CBP2 --> PIP2[Remote PIP strips I-TAG]
  PIP2 --> CE2[Customer]
  MEPf([CFM MA f per I-SID]) -.monitors.- CBP
  MEPb([CFM MA b per B-VID]) -.monitors.- BCB
blocks.zh:
flowchart LR
  CE[客户] --> PIP[BEB: PIP 添加 I-SID]
  PIP --> CBP[BEB: CBP 添加 B-TAG]
  CBP --> BCB[BCB 核心按 B-MAC 转发]
  BCB --> CBP2[远端 CBP]
  CBP2 --> PIP2[远端 PIP 剥离 I-TAG]
  PIP2 --> CE2[客户]
  MEPf([CFM MA f 按 I-SID]) -.监测.- CBP
  MEPb([CFM MA b 按 B-VID]) -.监测.- BCB

blocks.en: PBB-TE: the traffic-engineered backbone (26.9). PBB Traffic Engineering (PBB-TE) turns off flooding and spanning tree and instead provisions explicit point-to-point paths through static FDB entries. A directed path is an Ethernet Switched Path (ESP), identified by the 3-tuple <ESP-DA, ESP-SA, ESP-VID>; a forward and reverse pair of ESPs forms a Traffic Engineered Service Instance (TESI). CFM is adapted to monitor these: 26.9.1 sets a PBB-TE MEP's primary VID to the ESP-VID and its address to the CBP address; 26.9.2 notes that because ESP-VIDs can repeat, the TESI Multiplex Entity distinguishes them; 26.9.3 places PBB-TE MEPs as Up MEPs on CBPs and 26.9.4 places PBB-TE MIPs per ESP-VID on Provider Network Ports (PNPs); 26.9.5 adds a parallel set of TESI MD levels. 26.9.6 lists the protocol tweaks: Continuity Check (26.9.6.1) addresses CCMs by ESP-DA; Loopback (26.9.6.2) and Linktrace (26.9.6.3) carry a PBB-TE MIP TLV so the reply can be steered back. 26.9.7-26.9.11 do the analogous work for an Infrastructure Segment — a shared run of PNPs monitored by Segment Monitoring Paths (SMPs), each with an SMP-ID, paired into a Segment Identifier (SEG-ID), with Down MEPs on PNPs.
blocks.zh: PBB-TE：流量工程化的骨干（26.9）。PBB 流量工程（PBB-TE，PBB Traffic Engineering）关闭泛洪与生成树，转而通过静态 FDB 表项配置显式的点到点路径。一条有向路径称为以太网交换路径（ESP，Ethernet Switched Path），由 3 元组 <ESP-DA, ESP-SA, ESP-VID> 标识；一对正反向 ESP 构成流量工程业务实例（TESI，Traffic Engineered Service Instance）。CFM 被改造以监测它们：26.9.1 将 PBB-TE MEP 的主 VID 设为 ESP-VID、地址设为 CBP 地址；26.9.2 指出由于 ESP-VID 可重复，需由 TESI 复用实体加以区分；26.9.3 把 PBB-TE MEP 作为 Up MEP 置于 CBP，26.9.4 把 PBB-TE MIP 按 ESP-VID 置于运营商网络端口（PNP，Provider Network Port）；26.9.5 增加一套并行的 TESI MD 层级。26.9.6 列出协议改动：连续性检查（26.9.6.1）按 ESP-DA 寻址 CCM；环回（26.9.6.2）与链路追踪（26.9.6.3）携带 PBB-TE MIP TLV 以便回复能被正确引导。26.9.7–26.9.11 对基础设施段（Infrastructure Segment）做类似处理——一段共享的 PNP 序列，由段监测路径（SMP，Segment Monitoring Path）监测，每条 SMP 有 SMP-ID，成对构成段标识（SEG-ID），并在 PNP 上设置 Down MEP。

blocks.en: Protection switching (26.10-26.12). For a point-to-point TESI, PBB-TE provides 1:1 linear protection: a preconfigured protection TESI shadows a working TESI, and on a fault the carrier switches traffic over in under 50 ms (26.10.1, 26.10.2). The mechanism is driven by Continuity Check Messages (CCMs) — when a MEP stops hearing them it sets a defect, flips the B-VID in the Backbone Service Instance table to the protection ESP, and signals the far end with a Remote Defect Indication (RDI) bit so both ends switch. 26.10.3 specifies the Protection Switching state machines: a Hold-off machine (debounce a fault before reacting), a Clear Manual Switch machine, and a Service Mapping machine that calls mapDataToWorking() / mapDataToProtection(); request priorities run from Lockout of Protection (LoP) and Forced Switch (FS) at the top down to Wait-to-Restore (WTR). 26.11 reuses the very same state machines for Infrastructure Protection Switching (IPS), now protecting a Working Segment with a Protection Segment inside an Infrastructure Protection Group (IPG) — with nested IPGs, hold-off and WTR timers, administrative commands, a 1:1 form (26.11.4) and an optional M:1 form (26.11.5) that picks the highest-priority working candidate Protection Segment. Finally 26.12 defines the Mismatch defect: if the two ends disagree about which path is active (protection-switching-incomplete or working/protection misconfiguration), a MEP supporting the Traffic field detects it via the Mismatch state machine so an operator can fix it.
blocks.zh: 保护倒换（26.10–26.12）。对于点到点 TESI，PBB-TE 提供 1:1 线性保护：预先配置的保护 TESI 影随工作 TESI，发生故障时运营商在 50 ms 内完成切换（26.10.1、26.10.2）。该机制由连续性检查报文（CCM，Continuity Check Message）驱动——当 MEP 不再收到 CCM 时便置位缺陷，将骨干业务实例表中的 B-VID 翻转到保护 ESP，并通过远端缺陷指示（RDI，Remote Defect Indication）位通知对端，使两端同时倒换。26.10.3 规定了保护倒换状态机：去抖动的保持机（Hold-off）、清除手动切换机，以及调用 mapDataToWorking() / mapDataToProtection() 的业务映射机；请求优先级从顶端的保护锁定（LoP，Lockout of Protection）与强制切换（FS，Forced Switch）一路降到等待恢复（WTR，Wait-to-Restore）。26.11 把同一套状态机复用于基础设施保护倒换（IPS，Infrastructure Protection Switching），改为在基础设施保护组（IPG，Infrastructure Protection Group）内以保护段保护工作段——含嵌套 IPG、保持与 WTR 定时器、管理命令，以及 1:1 形式（26.11.4）和可选的 M:1 形式（26.11.5，从优先级最高的可用候选保护段中选取）。最后 26.12 定义失配缺陷：当两端对“哪条路径处于活动”意见不一致（保护倒换未完成，或工作/保护配置错误）时，支持 Traffic 字段的 MEP 通过失配状态机检测它，以便运营商修复。

blocks.en: Mental model: the I-SID names the service, the B-MAC names the destination edge bridge, and the B-VID names the path through the core. PBB (26.1-26.8) lets the core learn B-MACs and flood like a normal bridge; PBB-TE (26.9-26.12) throws that away for engineered ESPs plus fast, CCM-driven protection switching. CFM is the common nervous system that watches all of it.
blocks.zh: 记忆模型：I-SID 命名“业务”，B-MAC 命名“目的边缘桥接”，B-VID 命名“穿越核心的路径”。PBB（26.1–26.8）让核心像普通桥接那样学习 B-MAC 并泛洪；PBB-TE（26.9–26.12）抛弃这一点，改用工程化的 ESP，加上由 CCM 驱动的快速保护倒换。CFM 则是监视这一切的共同“神经系统”。

summary.en: Clause 26 coverage map — every sub-clause and where it lives
summary.zh: Clause 26 覆盖图——逐一对应每个子条款

blocks.en: Structure & forwarding: 26.1 PBBN overview (the principal elements: encapsulation, segregation, selection, protection, connectivity); 26.2 PBBN example (Figure 26-1, three zones, BEB/BCB/CNP/PIP/CBP roles); 26.3 B-VLAN connectivity (MSTP + MVRP per active topology, independent of customer protocols). Addressing: 26.4 backbone addressing (B-SA = PIP, default B-DA = Backbone Service Instance Group address built from OUI 00-1E-83 + I-SID, Table 26-1); 26.4.1 learning individual backbone addresses at a PIP (connection_identifier in the FDB, AdminPointToPointMAC for 2-endpoint services); 26.4.2 translating B-DA / I-SID at a CBP (local addressing, peer scaling); 26.4.3 CFM MP address uniqueness on PIPs/CBPs. Loops/scale/mgmt: 26.5 loop detection through attached networks (provider policy, Layer Two Gateway Ports); 26.6.1 hierarchical PBBNs (nesting adds encapsulation per level); 26.6.2 peer PBBNs (flat space, I-tagged CBP-CBP E-NNI, I-SID translation); 26.7 network management (provider-only, SNMP separation per RFC 3411). CFM in PBBs: 26.8 overview (four parallel MD-level stacks); 26.8.1 Port-based/S-tagged; 26.8.2 I-tagged; 26.8.3 hierarchical E-NNI; 26.8.4 peer E-NNI. PBB-TE CFM: 26.9 (TESI/ESP/Infrastructure Segment summary, no MIP for Infrastructure Segment MA); 26.9.1 addressing PBB-TE MEPs; 26.9.2 TESI identification (TESI Multiplex Entity); 26.9.3 MEP placement (Up MEPs on CBPs); 26.9.4 MIP placement (per ESP-VID on PNPs); 26.9.5 TESI MDs; 26.9.6.1/.2/.3 CCM/Loopback/Linktrace enhancements (PBB-TE MIP TLV); 26.9.7 addressing Infrastructure Segment MEPs (SMP-ID, SEG-ID); 26.9.8 Infrastructure Segment identification; 26.9.9 placement (Down MEPs on PNPs); 26.9.10 Infrastructure Segment MDs; 26.9.11 IPS CCM extension (SMP-DA addressing). Protection: 26.10.1 introduction (1:1 linear, sub-50 ms); 26.10.2 1:1 point-to-point TESI protection (TE protection group, coordinated groups for load sharing, RDI-driven switch); 26.10.3 state machines (timers WTRwhile/HoldOffWhile; variables BEGIN, SF, SFH, LoP, FS, MStoProtection, MStoWorking, WTRTime, HoldOffTime; mapDataToWorking/Protection; Figures 26-15/16/17). IPS: 26.11.1 Infrastructure Segment monitoring; 26.11.2 1:1 IPS (26.11.2.1 IPG, 26.11.2.1.1 nested IPGs, 26.11.2.2 switching method, 26.11.2.3 hold-off, 26.11.2.4 reversion + 26.11.2.4.1 WTR, 26.11.2.5 admin commands); 26.11.3 IPS Control entity; 26.11.4 1:1 IPS state machines (reuse 26.10.3); 26.11.5 M:1 IPS (candidate Protection Segments, MWTR timer, Protection Segment Selection state machine). Defect: 26.12 Mismatch defect (protection-switching-incomplete and working/protection mismatch; detected via Traffic field + Mismatch state machine of 20.26).
blocks.zh: 结构与转发：26.1 PBBN 概述（封装、隔离、选择、保护、连通等主要要素）；26.2 PBBN 示例（图 26-1，三个区域，BEB/BCB/CNP/PIP/CBP 角色）；26.3 B-VLAN 连通性（每个活动拓扑上的 MSTP + MVRP，独立于客户协议）。寻址：26.4 骨干寻址（B-SA = PIP，默认 B-DA = 由 OUI 00-1E-83 + I-SID 构造的骨干业务实例组地址，表 26-1）；26.4.1 PIP 学习单播骨干地址（FDB 中的 connection_identifier，两端点业务用 AdminPointToPointMAC）；26.4.2 CBP 翻译 B-DA / I-SID（本地寻址、对等扩展）；26.4.3 PIP/CBP 上 CFM MP 地址唯一性。环路/扩展/管理：26.5 经所连网络的环路检测（运营商策略、二层网关端口）；26.6.1 分层 PBBN（每层增加封装）；26.6.2 对等 PBBN（扁平空间，I 标签 CBP-CBP E-NNI，I-SID 翻译）；26.7 网络管理（仅运营商，按 RFC 3411 做 SNMP 视图分离）。PBB 中的 CFM：26.8 概述（四套并行 MD 层级栈）；26.8.1 基于端口/S 标签；26.8.2 I 标签；26.8.3 分层 E-NNI；26.8.4 对等 E-NNI。PBB-TE CFM：26.9（TESI/ESP/基础设施段综述，基础设施段 MA 不支持 MIP）；26.9.1 PBB-TE MEP 寻址；26.9.2 TESI 标识（TESI 复用实体）；26.9.3 MEP 放置（CBP 上的 Up MEP）；26.9.4 MIP 放置（PNP 上按 ESP-VID）；26.9.5 TESI MD；26.9.6.1/.2/.3 CCM/环回/链路追踪增强（PBB-TE MIP TLV）；26.9.7 基础设施段 MEP 寻址（SMP-ID、SEG-ID）；26.9.8 基础设施段标识；26.9.9 放置（PNP 上的 Down MEP）；26.9.10 基础设施段 MD；26.9.11 IPS 的 CCM 扩展（按 SMP-DA 寻址）。保护：26.10.1 引言（1:1 线性，亚 50 ms）；26.10.2 1:1 点到点 TESI 保护（TE 保护组、用于负载分担的协调保护组、RDI 驱动倒换）；26.10.3 状态机（定时器 WTRwhile/HoldOffWhile；变量 BEGIN、SF、SFH、LoP、FS、MStoProtection、MStoWorking、WTRTime、HoldOffTime；mapDataToWorking/Protection；图 26-15/16/17）。IPS：26.11.1 基础设施段监测；26.11.2 1:1 IPS（26.11.2.1 IPG，26.11.2.1.1 嵌套 IPG，26.11.2.2 倒换方法，26.11.2.3 保持定时器，26.11.2.4 恢复 + 26.11.2.4.1 WTR，26.11.2.5 管理命令）；26.11.3 IPS 控制实体；26.11.4 1:1 IPS 状态机（复用 26.10.3）；26.11.5 M:1 IPS（候选保护段、MWTR 定时器、保护段选择状态机）。缺陷：26.12 失配缺陷（保护倒换未完成与工作/保护配置失配；通过 Traffic 字段 + 20.26 失配状态机检测）。

cites.note: 26.1 overview, 26.2 example (Fig 26-1), 26.3 B-VLAN connectivity, start of 26.4 backbone addressing
26.4.1-26.4.3 addressing, Table 26-1 OUI, 26.5 loops, 26.6.1/26.6.2 scaling, 26.7 management, 26.8 CFM intro
26.8.1-26.8.4 CFM at each interface, 26.9 PBB-TE CFM summary, 26.9.1-26.9.3
26.9.4-26.9.11 PBB-TE/Infrastructure Segment CFM enhancements, 26.10.1 protection intro
26.10.2 1:1 TESI protection, 26.10.3 Protection Switching state machines, timers, variables, procedures
26.11 IPS (segments, IPG, nested, reversion, control, 1:1 and M:1 state machines), 26.12 Mismatch defect
